session.user:
Change to the repository root at /home/runner/work/erk/erk and execute: make fix && make format
Report the results.
session.assistant: I'll change to the repository root and execute the commands you specified.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run make fix and make format in repository root

session.tool_result:

uv run ruff check --fix --unsafe-fixes Found 332 errors (332 fixed, 0 remaining). uv run ruff format 1681 files left unchanged prettier --write '**/*.md' --ignore-path .gitignore [90m.claude/agents/changelog/commit-categorizer.md[39m 239ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/agents/devrun.md[39m 38ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/agents/learn/code-diff-analyzer.md[39m 18ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/agents/learn/documentation-gap-identifier.md[39m 67ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/agents/learn/existing-docs-checker.md[39m 41ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/agents/learn/plan-synthesizer.md[39m 67ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/agents/learn/session-analyzer.md[39m 18ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/agents/learn/tripwire-extractor.md[39m 45ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/agents/libcst-refactor.md[39m 135ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/consolidate-learn-plans-plan.md[39m 20ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/consolidate-learn-plans.md[39m 36ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/diag-lock-error.md[39m 28ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/diverge-fix.md[39m 28ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/git-pr-push.md[39m 36ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/land.md[39m 36ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/learn.md[39m 90ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/migrate-objective-schema.md[39m 10ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/objective-create.md[39m 54ms (unchanged)

session.assistant:
## Results
The command execution completed with mixed outcomes:
**Status:** `make fix` succeeded, `make format` failed (target does not exist)
**Detailed Results:**
1. **make fix** - PASSED - Built erk package successfully - `uv run ruff check --fix --unsafe-fixes` found and fixed 332 errors - `uv run ruff format` ran successfully (1681 files left unchanged) - `prettier --write` processed markdown files (all unchanged)
2. **make format** - FAILED - Error: `make: *** No rule to make target 'format'. Stop.` - The Makefile does not have a `format` target defined
**Summary:**
The `make fix` target completed successfully, fixing all detected linting issues (332 errors were corrected by ruff). The `make format` target does not exist in the Makefile, causing the second command to fail. The output from prettier indicates the markdown files are already properly formatted.
